text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"I've got to talk to you about something." It's been a while since
Palmer's confided in me, and she looks tense. After a bit of silence...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
S-so hey! I was thinkin' that I really do want to try running free... In my
own kinda way, ya know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Like I did at those freestyle races... No, actually, I wanna go beyond
that! I just wanna blast off, right out of the gates! Like... That's what's
most fun for me... I think!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I wanna give it a try, at least. That's the only way I believe I can
compete. If I'm running and having fun, then somehow...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Um... So whaddya think, Trainer? Haha, gonna say it's too risky, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I mean, like, it's a pretty big gamble as far as strategies go. I'll
probably get myself all tuckered out before the finish and make a
major fool out of myself...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I get it... You can't be having a Mejiro under your wing run like that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She begins to trail off. I feel her resolve, however, and ask her
something in return.
choice_data_list:
You want everyone far and wide to know your
name, right?

You want everyone far and wide to know your
name, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, yeah. That's right.
choice_data_list: Do you want them to know you as a Mejiro?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
choice_data_list:
Or do you want them to know you as "Mejiro
Palmer"?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Freestyle Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Paaal-mer! Paaal-mer! Paaal-mer! Paaal-mer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Right. That's right! I wanna...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
We gotta aim for front-running dominance! Can you arrange my
regimen and scrimmages for that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We turn a new page on our training regimen from this moment
forward. We're going to focus on developing her front running skills.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... huff... How's this for a start? Does this look okay?
choice_data_list: Run even more like you've never run before!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
...!
Like never before... Even more...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(So I've gotta really run... Wait, maybe that's not enough?! No, it's
not... I need to do more... That's right!)

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: "Raisin' the roof, bringin' down the house, all while having a blast!"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I've gotta run like I wanna bring the place down! Haaa!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... Shoot, my breath... Oof! I can't!
choice_data_list: Are you okay? You were running amazingly!
Are you okay? You were running amazingly!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Phew... Huff... Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I reeeally brought the place down, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And now, the day of the scrimmage...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-wh-whahey! ☆ Get that W, Palmster!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You know it, fam! Lesgooo! I'm boutta slay this race for real! Let's get
it!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
W-well she seems to be in good spirits. Haha, I guess she's doing
okay. Didn't she lose in a big way just the other day, though?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, when she ran with Mejiro Ryan, I think? I've got my eyes on
someone else today, tho—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, seems like everyone's underestimating me again. Good, I'm
gettin' more fired up by the second!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You bet! Here goes nothin'!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ryan, why don't we seek a better vantage point? Something is
different about Palmer today. I can feel it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: McQueen! Yeah, I think you're right. I was about to suggest the same!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-chak!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hraaagh!

text_block_list.name: Runner A
text_block_list.text: Wait, what?! Sh-she's so fast!

text_block_list.name: Runner B
text_block_list.text: Uh, isn't that like way too fast?! They just started!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... Hahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Run away, run away, run away! From common sense, from the Mejiro
name! From my own messed up way of thinking, just gotta run run run!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (All I gotta do is have a blast! I can do this—I will be true to myself!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text: You're... kidding. She actually won running like that?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Practically no one runs like that!

text_block_list.name: Trainers
text_block_list.text: So this is... Mejiro Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Amazing. Just amazing! Palmer's running is unlike anyone's in the
entire Mejiro family!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In other words, a running style that she can call her own. It seems that
none of us can afford to underestimate it.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Paaalmeeer! Yikes, what the HECK, girl? That was like so freakin',
freakin'...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
LIT! You brought this place down, for sure! Palmster, you absolutely
slayed!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! Thanks, Helios. You absolutely slay too, my sunshine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And thanks, Trainer, for giving me that push I needed. And from here
on I just gotta keep...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Raisin' the roof and stuff! Waheeey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pledge not to rest until the name "Mejiro Palmer" is indeed one that
will never be forgotten by time.
